items.title: What's in the US-Iran agreement?
items.summary: The 14-paragraph memo includes an end to fighting, an agreement that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon, and a $300bn redevelopment package for Iran.

items.title: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
items.summary: Three Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have passed the US blockade line in the Gulf of Oman, ship-tracking data shows.

items.title: Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC
items.summary: Japan needs to revisit the pacifist posture that has defined it since World War Two, Shinjiro Koizumi says.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 日本夫妻涉造假在留資格 助中國籍富豪非法引進保母被逮
items.summary: 日本東京發生一起涉嫌協助中國富豪非法引進保母的案件。一對住在東京港區的30多歲公司高層夫婦，因涉嫌以虛假內容申請在留資格協助中國籍保姆非法入境日本，遭到警視廳逮捕。  《NH...…

items.title: 獲贈簽字筆！李在明曬與川普自拍照 還被邀打高爾夫
items.summary: 南韓總統李在明17日結束在法國舉行的七大工業國集團（G7）峰會行程後，於返國途中透過網路社群發文表示，韓美同盟關係歷久彌新，並透露與美國總統川普進行了交流。  韓聯社報導，李...…

items.title: 數百人齊聚英格蘭牛津市中心 抗議英國極右翼活動家演講
items.summary: 數百名抗議者17日聚集在英格蘭牛津市中心，抗議英國極右翼活動家羅賓遜（Tommy Robinson）的演講。抵達牛津辯論社的羅賓遜本準備就伊斯蘭教問題發表演講，但演講因衝突而延...…
